caption: The battlefield ground is now seeded procedural texture -- mottled grass with worn-earth patches, a forest canopy of individual lit treetops on the west flank, a shaded hill with rock flecks on the east -- generated at battle load from a fixed art seed (no bundled assets, no sim RNG consumed). A lone cavalry troop crosses the open ground between them; unit team colours stay the dominant read against all three textures. Before/after stills are embedded in the PR description.
